en.Классический проект: OPC-сервер + histor:
Classic project: OPC server + historian + SCADA + MES + integration.
          ISPF covers the full stack with declarative object-tree configuration —
          from the field level to production reports and operator HMI.
en.: редактор символов, live-привязки\n:
: symbol editor, live bindings
          to device variables, orthogonal connections, and control from operator HMI.
          Logic stays in the tree — the diagram only displays and sends commands.
en.Современные платформы и технологии индус:
Modern industrial IoT platforms and technologies for private enterprises
          and the public sector — from control-system design to hardware and software delivery.
en.Полноэкранный редактор: палитра символов:
Full-screen editor: symbol palette, layers, properties, bindings, and actions —
            without a desktop SCADA package. The diagram is saved in the object tree and runs on operator HMI immediately.
en.OPC-сервер, historian, HMI, workflow и M:
OPC server, historian, HMI, workflow, and MES logic — nodes of one object tree
          with a unified REST/WebSocket API. Reference apps: power (mini-tec), warehouse, MES.
en.На HMI Мини-ТЭЦ оператор пишет «Запусти:
On the mini-TEC HMI, the operator types “Run shift report” — the agent finds the SQL report,
            offers a run button, and explains station summary figures in Russian.
en.Не стесняйтесь писать и звонить — мы люб:
Feel free to call or write — we enjoy talking to customers.
          We train your specialists, explain modern solutions, and issue IoT platform certificates.
en.Решения IoT и IIoT для автоматизации тех:
IoT and IIoT solutions for automating industrial and business processes for private companies
          and public organizations — hardware, software, and deployment on the platform
en.В Operator Apps загрузите СОП, README, р:
In Operator Apps, upload SOPs, READMEs, and procedures. Set the system prompt:
            “Reply in Russian, know everything about the plant, be polite” — the agent becomes your site expert.
en.Помогаем автоматизировать бизнес-процесс:
We automate business processes in manufacturing, energy, logistics, utilities, and other sectors.
          We use proven technologies and our own ISPF platform.
en.IoT Solutions — системный интегратор IoT: IoT Solutions — IoT/IIoT system integrator. Industrial and business process automation, hardware and software delivery. ISPF platform: SCADA, MES, marketplace.
en.ИИ-студия ускоряет настройку IoT/SCADA (:
The AI studio speeds up IoT/SCADA setup (devices, dashboards, bundles).
          The AI agent on operator HMI helps with reports and procedures — on top of ready MES/HMI.
en.Программа сертифицированных интеграторов:
Certified integrator and OEM vendor program. Training, exams, partner directory listing,
            and revenue share from marketplace listings.
en.Устройства, модели, дашборды и приложени:
Devices, models, dashboards, and apps — in one hierarchy with typed
            variables, events, functions, and MQTT auto-provisioning.
en.Peer registry, catalog sync, federation:
Peer registry, catalog sync, federation bind, and outbound tunnel —
            edge nodes behind NAT connect to the public hub without changing the object path.
en.Протоколы поля, historian на TimescaleDB:
Field protocols, TimescaleDB historian, BPMN, and React web-HMI —
        production-ready for power, oil & gas, and discrete manufacturing.
en.Профессиональные системы автоматизации и:
Professional automation and monitoring systems — real IoT Solutions projects
          deployed on the platform. Live demo catalog at
en.40+ виджетов: графики, gauge, network gr:

en.на layout дашборда загружает схему с сер:
on the dashboard layout loads the diagram from the server.
            Live levels, pressure, tank tables, and control — without duplicating tags.
en.Правила алерта — узлы дерева. CEL-услови:
Alert rules are tree nodes. CEL condition on a variable → event →
            webhook, email, workflow. Edge trigger and federation bind.
en.Modbus, OPC UA, SNMP, MQTT, JDBC, Kafka: Modbus, OPC UA, SNMP, MQTT, JDBC, Kafka — 58 drivers, 20 PRODUCTION in the interop lab. OPC UA server write-back, Driver DDK, edge agent.
